task_completion.description: Verify the customer name and expiration date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Aurora Dynamics Inc.' in the Customer field and a date approximately 30 days from the current date in the Expiration field.

task_completion.description: Verify the first section header and its corresponding note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a section header line titled 'Workstation Equipment' and a note line stating 'All workstation items include standard 2-year warranty' in the order lines table.

task_completion.description: Verify the products under the Workstation Equipment section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for product lines 'Ergonomic Standing Desk - Bamboo Top' with a Quantity of 20 and 'Premium Mesh Task Chair' with a Quantity of 20.

task_completion.description: Verify the second section header and its corresponding note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a section header line titled 'Technology & Peripherals' and a note line stating 'Technology items subject to separate IT support agreement' in the order lines table.

task_completion.description: Verify the products under the Technology & Peripherals section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for product lines '15-inch Business Laptop i7' with a Quantity of 25 and 'Wireless Ergonomic Mouse' with a Quantity of 25.

task_completion.description: Verify the total amount and that the quotation is saved in Draft state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Total field showing exactly '$58,710.00'. Ensure the document status indicates 'Quotation' (Draft state) and not 'Sales Order', and that the record appears to be saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Odoo web application UI in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should display the genuine Odoo interface with proper styling, menus, and fields, rather than a text editor or a mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the correct structured fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The products, sections, and notes should be added as distinct rows in the order lines table, not just pasted as a single block of text into a description or terms field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected customer is 'Aurora Dynamics Inc.'. The quotation must have a total amount of $58,710.00. The order lines must be structured with two sections: 'Workstation Equipment' (containing 20 Desks, 20 Chairs, and a warranty note) and 'Technology & Peripherals' (containing 25 Laptops, 25 Mice, and a support note). The document must be saved in the Draft state (indicated by 'Quotation' status, not 'Sales Order').
